{% macro is_active_recursive(item, current_url) %} {% if item.url is defined and current_url == item.url %} true {% elif item.children is defined %} {% for child in item.children %} {% set result = is_active_recursive(child, current_url) %} {% if result == "true" %}true{% endif %} {% endfor %} {% endif %} {% endmacro %} {% macro render_nav_item(item, level, path) %} {% if item.children is defined %} {% set is_active = false %} {% for child in item.children %} {% if child.url is defined and page.url == child.url %} {% set is_active = true %} {% endif %} {% if child.children is defined %} {% for grandchild in child.children %} {% if grandchild.url is defined and page.url == grandchild.url %} {% set is_active = true %} {% endif %} {% if grandchild.children is defined %} {% for greatgrandchild in grandchild.children %} {% if greatgrandchild.url is defined and page.url == greatgrandchild.url %} {% set is_active = true %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% endif %} {% endfor %}
    • {% for child in item.children %} {{ render_nav_item(child, level + 1, path ~ "_" ~ loop.index) }} {% endfor %}
    • {% else %}
  • {{ item.title }}
    • {% endif %} {% endmacro %}
      {% for item in nav %} {{ render_nav_item(item, 1, "__nav_" ~ loop.index) }} {% endfor %}
